title: Build failing with `ld` error: file size too small (length = 8)
body:
Verilator version: 4.216 2021-12-05 rev UNKNOWN.REV, Installed using `brew`
OS: MacOS 12.0.1 (21A559)
Files to reproduce: Run `build.sh` within the directory [repro.zip](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/7732174/repro.zip)

Expected: `verilator` command completes successfully
Actual:
```
clang++  -I.  -MMD -I/usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include/vltstd
-DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -faligned-new -fbracket-depth=4096 -fcf-protection=none -Qunused-arguments -Wno-bool-opera
tion -Wno-tautological-bitwise-compare -Wno-parentheses-equality -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -
Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -Os -c -o testbench.o ../testbench.cpp
clang++  -I.  -MMD -I/usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include/vltstd
-DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -faligned-new -fbracket-depth=4096 -fcf-protection=none -Qunused-arguments -Wno-bool-opera
tion -Wno-tautological-bitwise-compare -Wno-parentheses-equality -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -
Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -Os -c -o verilated.o /usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
clang++  -I.  -MMD -I/usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include/vltstd
-DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -faligned-new -fbracket-depth=4096 -fcf-protection=none -Qunused-arguments -Wno-bool-opera
tion -Wno-tautological-bitwise-compare -Wno-parentheses-equality -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -
Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -Os -c -o verilated_vcd_c.o /usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.cpp
/usr/bin/perl /usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/bin/verilator_includer -DVL_INCLUDE_OPT=include Vmain.cpp Vmain___024root__DepSet_
hf7d72865__0.cpp Vmain___024root__DepSet_ha6e06459__0.cpp Vmain__Trace__0.cpp Vmain___024root__Slow.cpp Vmain___024root__DepSet_hf7d72865__0__Slow
.cpp Vmain___024root__DepSet_ha6e06459__0__Slow.cpp Vmain__Syms.cpp Vmain__Trace__0__Slow.cpp > Vmain__ALL.cpp
clang++  -I.  -MMD -I/usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/share/verilator/include/vltstd
-DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -faligned-new -fbracket-depth=4096 -fcf-protection=none -Qunused-arguments -Wno-bool-opera
tion -Wno-tautological-bitwise-compare -Wno-parentheses-equality -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -
Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -Os -c -o Vmain__ALL.o Vmain__ALL.cpp
echo "" > Vmain__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
Archive ar -rcs Vmain__ALL.a Vmain__ALL.o
ar: @Vmain__ALL.a.verilator_deplist.tmp: No such file or directory
clang++    testbench.o verilated.o verilated_vcd_c.o Vmain__ALL.a      -o Vmain
ld: file too small (length=8) file 'Vmain__ALL.a' for architecture x86_64
clang: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
make: *** [Vmain] Error 1
rm Vmain__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
%Error: make -C obj_dir -f Vmain.mk exited with 2
%Error: Command Failed /usr/local/Cellar/verilator/4.216/bin/verilator_bin -cc --trace out.sv --exe testbench.cpp --top-module main --build
```

Not sure if this is a Mac-specific issue. Previous stackoverflow answers seem to suggest Xcode might be to blame but I couldn't apply the [fix provided](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/14034048/xcode-linker-error-file-too-small-for-architecture-x86-64/40149836#40149836) because the folder in question doesn't exist.
